title: Just Red Beds
description: Revert the "Colour Update" by having just Red Beds!
body:
# THESE MODS ARE NOW UNSUPPORTED, I WILL NOT BE UPDATING THEM ANYMORE

Miss the easy crafting of red beds? Hate having to find sheep of all the same colour? This mod rectifies this by undoing the colour update, making red beds the only beds!

The mod even changes all the other coloured beds to red, in case you find a village.

![Crafting a red bed from any wool variant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fdc8323d915a64ac319b450e7bc2cfae62b0c75.png)
